docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED MAY-05-2009, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT PRASAD, SUNIL
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-22-2009 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT PRASAD, SUNIL
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED AUG-03-2009 ORDERED DESTROYED

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF MAY-22-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF MAY-22-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $675.00 FILED BY ZIPKIN, TOR AS TO DEFENDANT PRASAD, SUNIL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR APR-28-2009 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ZIPKIN, TOR RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT PRASAD, SUNIL $675.00 PRINCIPAL, $30.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $705.00, THE COURT FINDS DEFENDANT DID NOT COMPLY WITH CIVIL CODE 1950.5 (G) AND THEREFORE MAY NOT WITHHOLD THE SECURITY DEPOSIT. DEFENDANT SHALL BE GIVEN CREDIT FOR THE CHECK OF $289.00 SENT TO TENANT WHEN THE CHECK IS DEPOSITED BY PLAINTIFF AND CLEARS THROUGH THE BANK. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-28-2009 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO MAY-22-2009 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT, DEFENDANT DOES NOT WAIVE SERVICE. JUDGE PRO TEM: BARBARA ANSCHER. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506).
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE JUDGE PRO TEM MARK SCHREIBER FILED BY ZIPKIN, TOR PRASAD, SUNIL
